tools_guide.title: User Guide
tools_guide.subtitle: System instructions and tutorials
tools_guide.system_overview_desc: vShip is a professional consolidation management system supporting package receiving, consolidation packing, and international shipping.
tools_guide.flow_step3: Customer submits consolidation order (selects packages, route)
tools_guide.flow_step4: Admin reviews order, packs and ships out
tools_guide.account_management_desc: Admins can add staff accounts and assign role permissions in User Management.
tools_guide.forecast_package_desc: Customers can forecast packages via the frontend with tracking number and category. Admins can also add manually in the backend.
tools_guide.inbound_operation_desc: Use the Scan Inbound feature to scan tracking barcodes for quick receipt confirmation. The system auto-matches forecast records.
tools_guide.problem_handling_desc: Packages that cannot be matched or have anomalies will enter the Problem Packages list for manual processing.
tools_guide.create_order_desc: Customers select inbound packages, choose shipping route and delivery address, then submit a consolidation order.
tools_guide.order_review_desc: Admins review order details, confirm weight and fees, then pack and ship out.
tools_guide.cost_calculation_desc: The system auto-calculates freight based on route pricing rules, package weight/volume, with value-added service surcharges.
tools_guide.create_batch_desc: Combine multiple pending orders into a batch for unified logistics arrangement.
tools_guide.batch_shipping_desc: Enter logistics company and tracking number; the system auto-notifies relevant customers.
tools_guide.tracking_update_desc: Supports manual or automatic synchronization of logistics tracking information.
tools_guide.warehouse_setup_desc: Supports multi-warehouse management with independent addresses and contact info per warehouse.
tools_guide.inventory_view_desc: View package inventory quantities and status distribution for each warehouse.
tools_guide.member_levels_desc: Supports multi-tier membership with different discounts and benefits per level.
tools_guide.points_system_desc: Members earn points from purchases; points can be used to offset shipping fees.
tools_guide.coupons_desc: Supports issuing various coupons with configurable conditions and validity periods.
